name: Job Requisition
description: Represents a job requisition in Workday, including job details, organisational data, and hiring requirements.

name: Location
description: Represents a physical or virtual work location, including country, state, city, and site details.

name: Job Posting
description: Represents a job posting in Avature, including job title, description, and posting metadata.

name: Job Board Posting
description: Represents the configuration for posting a job to internal and external job boards.

name: Candidate
description: Represents a candidate profile including personal details, application data, and status.

name: Interview
description: Represents an interview event including date, interviewer, feedback, and ratings.

name: Offer
description: Represents an offer package including salary, start date, currency, and candidate details.
